/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,vimbax_camera_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/vimbax_camera_msgs/vimbax_camera_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/vimbax_camera_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vimbax_camera_msgs/_vimbax_camera_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/root1/lzx_ws/project/vimbax_ros_camera/build/vimbax_camera_msgs/rosidl_generator_py/vimbax_camera_msgs:/home/root1/lzx_ws/project/vimbax_ros_camera/build/vimbax_camera_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/vimbax_camera_msgs/libvimbax_camera_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libvimbax_camera_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libvimbax_camera_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libvimbax_camera_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
